name: Neurogene Inc.
business: Neurogene Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing genetic medicines for rare neurological diseases. Its lead program, NGN-401, targets Rett syndrome using its EXACT platform for transgene regulation. The company also had a program for CLN5 Batten disease but has discontinued it.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company building a robust and differentiated product portfolio of genetic medicines for rare neurological diseases.

catalysts.event: Complete dosing in Embolden registrational trial
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete dosing in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Present updated interim data from Phase 1/2 trial
catalysts.sentence: We expect to present updated interim safety and efficacy data on the pediatric cohort and the adolescent/adult cohort from the Phase 1/2 trial in mid-2026.
We plan to initiate our Process Performance Qualification ( PPQ ) campaign in mid-2026.

tamClaims.claim: Global incidence of Rett syndrome is approximately one in 10,000 live female births.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate global incidence of Rett syndrome to be approximately one in 10,000 live female births.
